title: Chehra Hai Ya Chand Khila Hai

lines.lyrics: Chehra hai ya chaand khila hai
lines.indian: Ga Dha Dha Ni Sa' Ni Sa' Ga Ga ma Ga Ga
Ga Dha Dha Ni Sa' Ni Sa' Ni Dha Dha(k) Dha Pa
Pa Ni Sa' Re' Sa' Ni Dha Pa Pa Ma Pa Ma Pa Ma Pa

lines.lyrics: Ye to bata tera naam hai kya
lines.indian: Ga Dha Dha Ni Sa' Ni Sa' Ni Dha Dha(k) Dha

lines.lyrics: Chehra hai ya chaand khila hai

lines.lyrics: Ye to bata tera naam hai kya

lines.lyrics: Are tu kya jaane teri khaatir

Sa' Ni Ni Dha Dha Ni Ni Ga' Sa' Ni Sa'

lines.lyrics: Tu kya jaane dekh raha hai

lines.lyrics: Is dil pe ilzaam hai kya
